use_cases: Primary call-to-action triggers for forms, dialogs, and page navigation
Destructive action buttons for delete, remove, or cancel confirmations
Secondary navigation options within toolbars and header sections
Accessible link-style buttons for inline text navigation
Icon-only compact buttons for toolbars and action clusters
ai_summary: A reusable Button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority, offering multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes. Features shadow-based depth, smooth hover transitions, keyboard focus states, and disabled state handling. Designed for composition in larger UI systems with asChild prop support for polymorphic rendering.
